subcodes.first_line: O Radiant Messiah! Praise be to God that Thou hast been sent forth with an eloquent tongue and a comely countenance, and with clear and conclusive proof hast demonstrated [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مسیح ملیح الحمد لله بلسان فصیح و وجه صبیح مبعوث شدی و ببرهان صریح اثبات
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @spiritual transformation, @Greatest Name
